scripts.deploy: node scripts/prepare-dist.js && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=qbt-datavisualization --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:test: node scripts/prepare-dist.js && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=qbt-datavisualization-test --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:prod: node scripts/prepare-dist.js && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=qbt-datavisualization --commit-dirty=true
scripts.db:migrate:test: npx wrangler d1 execute qbt-auth-test --remote --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute qbt-auth-test --remote --file=./migrations/0002_login_security.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute qbt-auth-test --remote --file=./migrations/0003_cache_system.sql
